_meta.method: Web research across Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden (sotozen.no), Rinzai Zen Senter Oslo, Bergen Zen, IRIZ Hanazono Zen centers directory, Sotoshu Europe directory, Plum Village/Floating Clouds sangha references
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~80% of organized Zen groups; some smaller sub-groups of Sotozenordenen lack standalone web presence
knownGaps: 'Hashin-ji / Rinzai-ji Norway' referenced in prompt - not located online; Rinzai-ji's Affiliated Centers list does not include a Norwegian temple; possibly conflated with Rinzai Zen Senter Oslo (which is Joshu Sasaki Roshi lineage, i.e. Rinzai-ji) or a defunct group
Sandnes/Stavanger Zen Senter currently on pause per sotozen.no
Sandefjord group listed by Sotozen.no without details
Plum Village Norway: only Sangha of Floating Clouds (Drivende Skyer) Oslo confirmed; no national umbrella site located
Kwan Um School: no Norwegian center listed in Kwan Um Europe directory
Norsk Zen Forbund referenced in prompt - not located as a separate organization; may refer to Sotozenordenen

places.name: Bugakuji Zen-tempel (Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden)
places.notes: Headquarters of Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden (Norwegian Soto Zen Buddhist Order); Rev. Sozen Kusano Larsen abbot; listed on Sotoshu Europe directory

places.name: Bergen Zen Senter (Regndråpe Sangha)
places.notes: U ryu så - Regndråpe Sangha, Sotozen fellowship in Bergen; weekly Thursday zazen 19:30-21:00; affiliated with Sotozenordenen

places.name: Haugesund Zen-senter (Stille Sinn Sangha)
places.notes: Affiliated with Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden; led by Lars-Eivind Haukaas

places.name: Sandnes/Stavanger Zen-senter
places.notes: Affiliated with Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden; led by Chirin (Bente Grønn); currently on pause per sotozen.no

places.name: Tønsberg Zen-gruppe
places.notes: Affiliated with Den norske Sotozen Buddhistorden; led by Djien (Dorthe Leth)

places.name: Rinzai Zen-senter Oslo
places.notes: Originally Oslo Zazenkai; renamed Rinzai Zen Senter Oslo 1996; teacher Herbert Koudela (Genro Seiun Osho); morning and evening zazen

places.name: Sangha of Floating Clouds (Drivende Skyer)
places.notes: Vietnamese Zen / Plum Village sangha in Oslo, founded by Svein Myreng (Order of Interbeing); Bjørn Petter Hernes contact
